title: Chirayu Healthcare | Best Diagnostic Centre, Pathology Lab in Mumbai
heading: Dr Dilip Rajpal
description: NABL ISO 9001 Certified Labs | Free Home Sample Collection | Lowest Prices Guaranteed. Amenities: Big Savings on Lab Tests, Trained Staff
text: Chirayu Healthcare | Best Diagnostic Centre, Pathology Lab in Mumbai 022-25291400 info@chirayuhealthcare.co.in Mon – Sat : 7:30 AM to 9 PM , Sun : 7:30 AM to 2 PM Book Appointment Contact Number +91-8149212273 Home About Us Doctors Services Home Sample Collection Laparoscopic Surgeon ETO services Varicose Veins Treatment ECG Test Varicose Veins Pathology lab Piles Fissure and fistula Updates Video Contact Us Select Page Our Services Complete Diagnostic Centre Lab @ Home General & Laparoscopic Surgery Varicose Veins Treatment ETO  services Pathology Due to lockdown We are offering online consultation approved by Maharashtra Medical Council Call : +91-9821106299 For the same Consultation charges : Rs. 500/- Mode of payment – Paytm /google pay Book Now Dr Dilip Rajpal Laparoscopic Surgeon / General Surgeon +91-7039000696 Dr Dilip Rajpal is a Laparoscopic Surgeon and General Surgeon in Chembur, Mumbai and has an experience of 20+ years in these fields. Dr. Dilip Rajpal practices at Chirayu Healthcare Polyclinic & Diagnostics in Chembur, Mumbai, Godrej Memorial Hospital in Vikhroli, Mumbai and Apollo Spectra Hospital in Chembur, Mumbai. He completed MS,MAIS,FICS,Diploma in Laparoscopic Surgery,Fellow in Robotic & Adv Laparoscopic Colo-Rectal Surgery(Korea University) & BYL Nair Charitable Hospital in 1995, MS – General Surgery from Grant Medical College and Sir JJ Hospital, Mumbai in 1999 and FICS – General Surgery from International College Of Surgeon in 2008. He is a member of Association of Surgeons of India (ASI), Association of Minimal Access Surgeons of India (AMASI), International College of Surgeons (ICS) and Fellow of advanced laparoscopic colo-rectal and robotic surgery, Korea University (ANAM Hospital). Some of the services provided by the doctor are SILS (Single incision laparoscopic Cholecystectomy surgery) for Gall bladder calculli (stone), Sils Appendectomy for Appendicitis, laparoscopic Hernia repair surgery for inguinal, ventral & incisional hernia, laser treatment of varicose veins (EVLA- Endovenous laser Ablation of varicose veins), painless piles surgery (MIPH-Stappler piles surgery, suture Rectopexy), complicated & recurrent fistula treatment for fistula ano, lateral internal sphincterotomy for fissure ano, abdominal pain treatment, etc. Dr Dilip Rajpal Laparoscopic Surgeon / General Surgeon +91-7039000696 Dr Dilip Rajpal is a Laparoscopic Surgeon and General Surgeon in Chembur, Mumbai and has an experience of 20+ years in these fields. Dr. Dilip Rajpal practices at Chirayu Healthcare Polyclinic & Diagnostics in Chembur, Mumbai, Godrej Memorial Hospital in Vikhroli, Mumbai and Apollo Spectra Hospital in Chembur, Mumbai. He completed MBBS from Topiwala National Medical College & BYL Nair Charitable Hospital in 1995, MS – General Surgery from Grant Medical College and Sir JJ Hospital, Mumbai in 1999 and FICS – General Surgery from International College Of Surgeon in 2008. He is a member of Association of Surgeons of India (ASI), Association of Minimal Access Surgeons of India (AMASI), International College of Surgeons (ICS) and Fellow of advanced laparoscopic colo-rectal and robotic surgery, Korea University (ANAM Hospital). Some of the services provided by the doctor are Gall Bladder Cancer, Lap. Fundoplication,Open & Lap. Hernioplasty, Abdomen Pain Treatment,Piles Surgery and keloid/scar treatment etc. What Make Us Different Qualified Specialists We hire the best specialists to deliver top-notch diagnostic services for you. Modern Equipment We use the technically advanced medical equipment for timely diagnostics of various diseases. Complete Diagnostics Our  diagnostics services help you get the most accurate diagnosis in a minimal time. All Kind Of Diagnostics Centre Chirayu Healthcare Polyclinic & Diagnostics centre offers from pathology to digital X-Ray to health at home facilities for Blood collection, portable X-Ray and ECG. All Kind Of Diagnostics Chirayu Healthcare Polyclinic & Diagnostics offers the region’s most comprehensive range of diagnostic services, from MRI to X-ray. What we Offer Our Doctor’s Testimonials By Patient The whole team of Chirayu Healthcare Centre is extremely cooperative. All of them are willing to lend a hand. Overall had a pleasant experience. Patient The experience of meeting Dr. Dilip and his entire team was excellent. Thank you for the seamless service! Supriya Wankhade Patient Testimonials By Doctor Myself Dr Jayeshree shevale. I want to share my experience with Dr. Dilip Rajpal. In Oct 2019 , undergone single incison laparoscopic cholecystectomy performed by Dr. Dilip Rajpal. I was back to work at my clinic on 8th day. To me he is an magician. Dr. Dilip Rajpal is very skilled, expertise in his field and as a human being. He is humble, helpful and down to earth. I am very much thankful to Dr. Dilip Rajpal. Yes he is the best Laparoscopic Surgeon in Mumbai. Dr. Jayeshree shevale Doctor Dr Dilip Rajpal is an extremely versatile surgeon who very calmly handles a variety of health issues. He makes the patient understand his/her medical condition and suggests the best possible treatment options available. He is very compassionate towards patient health care and looks after every aspect of treatment minutely. We are fortunate to have diligent surgeons like him in our society Dr. Rajiv Manek Doctor Menu Home About Us What we offer Services Doctors Video Book an Appointment Contact Us Dr. Dilip Rajpal consultation time 6.00Pm to 8.00Pm Clinic Address Chirayu Healthcare Polyclinic & Diagnostic Shop No 7, Building 1&2, Atur Park, Near Jhama Sweets, Behind Bus Stop, Sion-Trombay Rd,  Chembur,  Mumbai 400071 Timing : Mon – Sat : 7:30am to 7pm Sunday : 7:30am to 2pm info@chirayuhealthcare.co.in Contact Number: 7039000696 9821106299 02225291400 02225291700 Locations Satyam Hospital Bhaveshwar Plaza, Ghatkopar(West) Contact Number: (+91 22) 2500 4409 Timing : 12:30 pm to 2:30 pm Apollo Spectra Hospital: Behind Aangan Hall, Chembur, Mumbai 400071 Contact Nnumber : (+91 22) 4334 4609 Timing : 5:00 pm to 6:00 pm Locations Kohinoor Hospital Kirol Road, Ali Yavar Jung, Kurla West, Off LBS Road, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070 Contact Number : (+91 22) 6755 6755 Godrej Memorial Hospital Pirojshanagar, Vikhroli East, Mumbai 400079 Contact Number : (+91 – 9821109779) Timing : Mon-Sat 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM Wed 3:00 PM to 4:00 PM Facebook Twitter Designed and Developed by MagentaHive Technologies LLP
